allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'tailwind' in k or 'postcss' in k or 'tw' in k}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'wind' in k.lower\(\) or 'tw' in k.lower\(\)]")
